title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity.

title: A path traversal vulnerability was found in spice-vdagent. This flaw allows a malicious or...
description: A path traversal vulnerability was found in spice-vdagent. This flaw allows a malicious or compromised SPICE host to write arbitrary files to any location on the guest operating system. This occurs because the filename provided by the SPICE host during file transfers is not properly sanitized before being used. An attacker could exploit this to write to sensitive locations with the privileges of the spice-vdagent process, typically the logged-in user. This issue requires the SPICE host to be unt

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The path traversal vulnerability in spice-vdagent could allow a malicious or compromised SPICE host to write arbitrary files to sensitive locations on the guest operating system. This could lead to unauthorized access, data corruption, privilege escalation, or further exploitation of the system.
recommended_actions: Update spice-vdagent to the latest patched version that addresses CVE-2026-57966.
Implement strict access controls and monitoring for SPICE hosts to prevent unauthorized access.
Regularly audit virtualized environments for vulnerabilities and apply security best practices.

title: Eclipse tinydtls before commit b3efd41ad111a4920f599f51ffa4f5e9f1e72221 contains an out-of-bounds...
description: Eclipse tinydtls before commit b3efd41ad111a4920f599f51ffa4f5e9f1e72221 contains an out-of-bounds read vulnerability in the check_server_certificate() function that allows unauthenticated attackers to trigger reads beyond valid buffer boundaries by crafting a Certificate handshake message with a specific fragment_length value. Attackers can exploit missing buffer length validation before uint24 reads, memcmp, and memcpy operations during DTLS epoch 0 on both client and server paths to cause deni

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-9267.

title: Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key vulnerability in Matteo Manna Simple User Avatar...
description:
Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key vulnerability in Matteo Manna Simple User Avatar allows Exploiting Incorrectly Configured Access Control Security Levels.

This issue affects Simple User Avatar: from n/a through 4.9.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows unauthorized users to bypass access controls and potentially manipulate or gain access to sensitive user data. This could lead to data breaches, unauthorized modifications, or privilege escalation.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the Simple User Avatar plugin to the latest patched version if available.
Review and strengthen access control configurations to ensure proper validation of user-controlled keys.
Monitor systems for unusual activity and unauthorized access attempts, and implement logging to detect exploitation.

title: A flaw was found in spice-vdagent. A malicious or compromised SPICE host can trigger an integer...
description: A flaw was found in spice-vdagent. A malicious or compromised SPICE host can trigger an integer overflow by sending a specially crafted message. This vulnerability can lead to a heap buffer overflow, causing the spice-vdagent daemon to crash and resulting in a Denial of Service (DoS) for the virtual machine. This issue requires the SPICE host to be untrusted or compromised for exploitation.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-57965.

title: Because O+ Connect's IPC service does not authenticate clients, external applications can...
description: Because O+ Connect's IPC service does not authenticate clients, external applications can escalate privileges and perform sensitive actions through the IPC channel.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The lack of client authentication in O+ Connect's IPC service allows external applications to escalate privileges and execute sensitive actions, potentially leading to unauthorized access, data breaches, or system compromise.
recommended_actions: Implement client authentication mechanisms for the IPC service to ensure only authorized applications can interact with it.
Conduct a thorough security audit of the IPC service to identify and address any other potential vulnerabilities.
Deploy patches or updates to affected systems immediately and notify users of the vulnerability.

title: A flaw was found in the libblkid library of util-linux. During nested partition probing, the BSD,...
description: A flaw was found in the libblkid library of util-linux. During nested partition probing, the BSD, Minix, Solaris x86, and UnixWare partition probers cache a raw pointer to a parent partition entry in a dynamically allocated array. When subsequent partition additions cause the array to be reallocated, this pointer becomes stale, leading to a heap use-after-free read. An attacker who can present a crafted block device image (for example, via USB insertion or a loop-mounted disk image) can trigger

description: A vulnerability was determined in Hanwang e-Face General Management Platform 6.3.5.4. This issue affects some unknown processing of the file /manage/resourceUpload/upload.do. Monitor systems for unusual activity or unauthorized file uploads, and review access logs for signs of exploitation.

Monitor logs for unusual API activity, particularly targeting the /api/users endpoint, and block suspicious IPs.

description: The F4 Post Tree WordPress plugin before 2.0.5 does not perform capability checks or CSRF/nonce verification on one of its AJAX actions, allowing authenticated users with Subscriber-level access and above to modify the parent and menu order of arbitrary posts.

title: A weakness has been identified in itsourcecode Hospital Management System 1.0. This impacts an...
description: A weakness has been identified in itsourcecode Hospital Management System 1.0. This impacts an unknown function of the file /doctorchangepassword.php. Executing a manipulation of the argument newpassword can lead to sql injection. The attack may be performed from remote. The exploit has been made available to the public and could be used for attacks.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The identified SQL injection vulnerability in itsourcecode Hospital Management System 1.0 could allow attackers to manipulate database queries, potentially leading to unauthorized access, data leakage, or data corruption. Given that this system is used in healthcare, sensitive patient data may be at risk.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply input validation and parameterized queries to sanitize the 'newpassword' parameter in /doctorchangepassword.php.
Restrict public access to the affected endpoint until a patch is deployed to mitigate the risk of exploitation.
Notify users of the software to update to a patched version or apply temporary mitigations if a patch is not yet available.

title: A vulnerability was identified in Wavlink WL-NU516U1-A M16U1_V240425. The impacted element is the...
description: A vulnerability was identified in Wavlink WL-NU516U1-A M16U1_V240425. The impacted element is the function sub_407504 of the file /cgi-bin/wireless.cgi of the component POST Parameter Handler. Such manipulation of the argument Guest_ssid leads to stack-based buffer overflow. The attack can be executed remotely. The exploit is publicly available and might be used. It is suggested to upgrade the affected component. The vendor was contacted early, responded in a very professional manner and quickly

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a stack-based buffer overflow, potentially leading to unauthorized access, data theft, or service disruption. The exploit is publicly available, increasing the likelihood of exploitation.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply the latest firmware update provided by the vendor to patch the vulnerability.
Disable remote access to the affected device until the patch is applied to minimize exposure.
Conduct a security audit of all devices in the network to ensure no other vulnerabilities are present.

title: A security flaw has been discovered in CodeAstro Complaint Management System 1.0. The affected...
description: A security flaw has been discovered in CodeAstro Complaint Management System 1.0. The affected element is the function deletereport of the file application/controllers/Report.php of the component Report Endpoint. The manipulation results in authorization bypass. The attack can be executed remotely. The exploit has been released to the public and may be used for attacks.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The discovered vulnerability in CodeAstro Complaint Management System 1.0 allows for authorization bypass via the 'deletereport' function in the Report Endpoint. This could enable attackers to delete sensitive reports or manipulate data without proper authorization, potentially compromising the integrity and availability of the system.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply any available patches or updates provided by CodeAstro to address the vulnerability.
Implement access control mechanisms such as IP whitelisting or VPN access to restrict unauthorized access to the affected endpoint.
Monitor logs for unusual activity, particularly around the 'deletereport' function, and establish alerts for potential exploitation attempts.

title: CVE-2026-8157 - The Vitepos  WordPress plugin before 3.4.2 does not properly restrict the roles that can be assigned
description: The Vitepos  WordPress plugin before 3.4.2 does not properly restrict the roles that can be assigned when creating new users via one of its REST API endpoints, allowing authenticated users with a custom Vitepos  WordPress plugin before 3.4.2 role to escalate privileges to administrator.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-8157.

title: CVE-2026-7859 - The Motors  WordPress plugin before 1.4.110 does not have proper authorisation and CSRF checks on on
description: The Motors  WordPress plugin before 1.4.110 does not have proper authorisation and CSRF checks on one of its AJAX actions, allowing unauthenticated attackers to modify arbitrary post metadata, such as the gallery, featured image and, on WooCommerce sites, product prices.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows unauthenticated attackers to modify critical post metadata, including gallery images, featured images, and product prices on WooCommerce sites. This could lead to website defacement, loss of customer trust, and financial damage due to manipulated product pricing.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the Motors WordPress plugin to version 1.4.110 or later to patch the vulnerability.
Implement a Web Application Firewall (WAF) to monitor and block unauthorized access to AJAX actions.
Conduct a security audit of the website to identify and mitigate potential unauthorized changes to post metadata.

title: CVE-2026-6858 - The Transbank Webpay WordPress plugin before 1.14.0 does not sanitize and escape logs to be displaye
description: The Transbank Webpay WordPress plugin before 1.14.0 does not sanitize and escape logs to be displayed, allowing unauthenticated users to perform Stored XSS attacks against logged in administrator

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows unauthenticated attackers to execute Stored XSS attacks, potentially compromising administrator accounts and enabling further exploitation, such as data theft, privilege escalation, or website defacement.
affected_industries: Small and Medium Businesses using WordPress
recommended_actions: Immediately update the Transbank Webpay WordPress plugin to version 1.14.0 or later to patch the vulnerability.
Review and sanitize existing logs to ensure no malicious scripts have been injected.
Implement a Web Application Firewall (WAF) to block potential XSS payloads and monitor for suspicious activity.

title: CVE-2026-10530 - The Pie Register  WordPress plugin before 3.8.4.10 does not use sufficiently random values when gene
description: The Pie Register  WordPress plugin before 3.8.4.10 does not use sufficiently random values when generating its account verification tokens, allowing unauthenticated attackers to predict a valid token and activate an account without access to the associated email inbox.

title: CVE-2026-6645 - An insecure process execution vulnerability exists in the pc-printer-updater.exe component of the Pa
description:
An insecure process execution vulnerability exists in the pc-printer-updater.exe component of the PaperCut Print Deploy Client for Windows. The application, which typically operates with high-level system privileges, attempts to perform an internal validation check by invoking a secondary system utility using an unqualified file reference.



Because the application does not specify an absolute path to this utility, it relies on the operating system's default search order to locate the executable. Under specific conditions, a local attacker with the ability to modify directories within the system's search path could plant a malicious binary that mimics the expected utility. This could result in the malicious code being executed with SYSTEM privileges, leading to a full compromise of the affected host.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-6645.

title: CVE-2026-8918 - A permissive list of allowed inputs in ASUS Armoury Crate allows a local administrator to perform ar
description:
A permissive list of allowed inputs in ASUS Armoury Crate allows a local administrator to perform arbitrary memory read/write operations or cause a system crash (BSOD) by bypassing the validation mechanism.Refer to the '
Security Update for Armoury Crate App ' section on the ASUS Security Advisory for more information.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-8918.

title: CVE-2026-11748 - A vulnerability has been identified in centraldogma-server-auth-shiro versions prior to 0.84.0, wher
description: A vulnerability has been identified in centraldogma-server-auth-shiro versions prior to 0.84.0, where the SearchFirstActiveDirectoryRealm substitutes the login username into an LDAP search filter without neutralizing LDAP filter metacharacters, allowing an unauthenticated attacker to manipulate the filter to cause authentication confusion and enumerate the directory structure.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11748.

title: CVE-2026-11746 - A vulnerability has been identified in centraldogma-server versions prior to 0.84.0, where enabling
description: A vulnerability has been identified in centraldogma-server versions prior to 0.84.0, where enabling ZooKeeper replication without setting replication.secret causes the server to silently fall back to a hard-coded, publicly known secret. This default credential authenticates the embedded ZooKeeper ensemble, allowing an attacker with network access to read the full replication log or join the quorum and execute arbitrary replicated commands across the cluster.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11746.

title: CVE-2026-11745 - A vulnerability has been identified in centraldogma-server-mirror-git versions prior to 0.84.0, wher
description: A vulnerability has been identified in centraldogma-server-mirror-git versions prior to 0.84.0, where the Git mirror SSH client does not verify remote host keys for git+ssh:// connections, allowing an on-path attacker to perform man-in-the-middle attacks and compromise mirrored repositories.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11745.

The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.
